category_sources: GNOME wiki archive describes gucharmap as the GNOME Character Map.
source_facts.description says gucharmap is GNOME Character Map based on the Unicode Character Database.
display_name_sources: Official GNOME wiki archive identifies gucharmap as GNOME Character Map.
docs_sources: Official GNOME GitLab project is the source-level project surface.
source_facts.homepage is the official GNOME app documentation page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/gucharmap, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GNOME wiki archive lists Unicode browsing/search features and notes the character map is a GTK+ widget.
source_facts.description supports Unicode, character-map, and GNOME tags.
